name: @conductor/agent-memory
description: Conversation memory for the agent runtime — in-memory by default, Postgres (Prisma) when DATABASE_URL is set.
comment: Postgres is opt-in: run `pnpm add @prisma/client prisma` here, then `pnpm prisma:generate` and set DATABASE_URL. PrismaStore lazy-imports @prisma/client, so it stays optional.
